popularStory.headline: Will of William Echols, 1771
popularStory.description:
Halifax County - Will Book O p.310 
WILL OF WILLIAM ECHOLS - Dated: 8 Apr 1771; Prob: 16 May 1771

Lend to Sarah Echols [Sarah TURNER], my wife, the land I now live on plus my corn mill & all my movea …

birthPlace.address: Bristol Parish, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America

christeningPlace.address: Bristol Parish, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Captain Vardry McBee (1734-1805) of Halifax County, Virginia, moved to Ninety-Six District SC about 1765. He was a Cavalry Captain in the Revolutionary War in South Carolina, serving over 440 days during 1780-1782. He was present at the fall of Charleston SC (April-May 1780), and present at the Battles of Kings Mountain (October 1780) and Cowpens (Jan 1781) both of which were in the area of western SC where he lived. During the war he served with Colonel Elijah Clarke in the Carolinas. Captain McBee also provided sustenance for troops in Georgia and SC; his Rev War claim paperwork is in the SCDAH archives online.

Source: http://revwarapps.org/sc1006.pdf
https://www.archivesindex.sc.gov/

Captain Vardry's sons, Mathias (or Mathew) and Silas McBee, both served in SC during the Revolutionary War. Silas McBee was in his father's company of horse and was present at the Battle of King's Mountain SC, and Mathias McBee served in the SC militia.

After the war, Capt Vardry McBee (Sr) continued his survey work in his home district, the Thicketty Creek area of Old Ninety-Six District SC. He seems to have divided his SC lands among his children, as all, or almost all, of his adult children each received 640 acres by summer 1785, their lands usually adjoining a family member's lands. Vardry McBee's name is on dozens of land plats in the State Plat Books of South Carolina for lands in modern Cherokee, SC. His surveys can be found in the online records of the SC Dept of Archives and History (SCDAH). Vardry McBee's last survey (in the SC archives) was in Sep 1786 for lands on the Broad River of Ninety-Six District, SC. 

Source: http://www.archivesindex.sc.gov/

By 1795, Vardry McBee (Sr) possibly moved with his adult children to Logan County in the Kentucky territory shortly before his death. His daughter Elizabeth, and son-in-law, John Gardner, also moved to Butler co KY circa 1804. 

But by about 1805, Vardry McBee (Sr) would have had grandchildren named Vardry McBee, so researchers should exercise caution with this Kentucky move. Vardry (Sr) may have died in SC before his adult children moved to KY. Vardry McBee (Jr) b. 1775, didn't move to KY, he was a court clerk for Lincoln co NC through about 1840 and settled in Greenville SC in retirement until his death there in 1864. 

McBee family is in Logan co KY circa 1795, and they're found in Butler co KY by about 1804. Source: KY court records. Logan was formed 1797; Court Order Book 2, p.138.  Date not given - book goes from May 1801 to Aug 1804.  

Vardry McBee's estate included pewter, books, hogs.
Logan Co, KY Court Order Book 10, p.136 has a list of sales and inventories that did not get recorded in the will or settlement books.  Among these is Vardry McBee, 1801.

Hannah received the land grant in Christian Co, KY at one time a part of Logan Co, KY in 1799, perhaps indicating Vardry had already died by then.  There is a marriage in Logan Co of Henry Glissen to a Lucy McBee on 13 Oct 1795.  Silas McBee had several land grants in Christian Co, KY over the next several years. Tax Lists Logan Co, KY 1792-1800

1799 McBee, "Bardy"  1 white male over 21, 1 white male 16-21

1800 McBee, "Berden" 1 white male over 21, 2 horses

It seems quite possible that his son Silas was in Logan Co, KY first. He was on the tax lists beginning in 1794; he was not listed in the same years as Vardry.  In 1797, Christian Co was created from Logan Co, KY and that's where Silas' KY land patents were located.

Index to Surveys Logan Co KY
Book B, p.324   Elizabeth McBee 120 acres, 20 Feb 1799 
Book D, p.337  Hannah McBee  150 acres Green River [Hickory Camp Cr] 9 Nov 1807. The inclusion of Hannah makes it likely that she could be Vardry's widow, Hannah Echols.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Vardry McBee於1734年12月23日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪布里斯托 帕里什時，他的父親William McBee40歲，母親Susannah Vardry26歲。他於大約1758年與Hannah Echols在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州哈利法可安特里姆 帕里什結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1779年住在美國南卡羅來納州迪斯特利可特 9。他於1785年登記服兵役。他去世於1801年1月18日之前在美國肯塔基州洛根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vardry McBee于1734年12月23日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪布里斯托 帕里什时，他的父亲William McBee40岁，母亲Susannah Vardry26岁。他于大约1758年与Hannah Echols在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州哈利法可安特里姆 帕里什结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1779年住在美国南卡罗来纳州迪斯特利可特 9。他于1785年登记服兵役。他去世于1801年1月18日之前在美国肯塔基州洛根。

historicEvents.description: "Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: South Carolina becomes the 8th state in the Union
historicEvents.description: On May 23, 1788, South Carolina ratifies the Constitution of the United States making it the 8th State of the Union.

en.lifeSummary: When Vardry McBee was born on 23 December 1734, in Bristol Parish, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, William McBee, was 40 and his mother, Susannah Vardry, was 26. He married Hannah Echols about 1758, in Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in District 96, South Carolina, United States in 1779. He registered for military service in 1785. He died before 18 January 1801, in Logan, Kentucky, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vardry McBee est né le 23 décembre 1734, à Bristol Parish, Charles City County, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William McBee, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Susannah Vardry, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Echols environ 1758, à Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à District 96, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis en 1779. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1785. Il est décédé avant 18 janvier 1801, à Logan, Kentucky, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Vardry McBee am 23. Dezember 1734 in Bristol Parish, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater William McBee 40 und seine Mutter Susannah Vardry 26. Er hat um 1758 in Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America Hannah Echols geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1779 hat er in District 96, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er hat sich 1785 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb vor 18. Januar 1801 in Logan, Kentucky, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vardry McBee è nato il il 23 dicembre 1734 nel Bristol Parish, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William McBee, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Susannah Vardry, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Echols circa 1758, nel Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a District 96, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1779. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1785. Morì prima del 18 gennaio 1801, nel Logan, Kentucky, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Vardry McBeeが1734年12月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイブリストル パーイッシュで生まれた時，父William McBeeは40歳，母Susannah Vardryは26歳であった。約1758年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ハリファックスアントリム パーイッシュでHannah Echolsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1779年にはアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州ディストリクト 9に住んでいた。彼は1785年に兵役登録をした。彼は1801年1月18日以前にアメリカ合衆国ケンタッキー州ロガンで死去した。

ko.Birch Creek, Halifax, Virginia, United S: 미국 버지니아 주 할이파스 비르치 크리크

ko.Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 할이파스
ko.lifeSummary: Vardry McBee(이)가 1734년 12월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티 브리스톨 파리시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William McBee(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Susannah Vardry(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1758년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 할이파스 앤트림 파리시에서 Hannah Echols(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1779년도에 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 디스트릭트 9에서 살았다. 그는 1785년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1801년 1월 18일 이전 미국 켄터키 주 로건에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vardry McBee nasceu em 23 de dezembro de 1734, em Bristol Parish, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, William McBee, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Susannah Vardry, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Echols aproximadamente 1758, em Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em District 96, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América em 1779. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1785. Ele faleceu antes 18 de janeiro de 1801, em Logan, Kentucky, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vardry McBee родился 23 декабря 1734 г. в местности бристол пэриш, чарльс сити коунти, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William McBee было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Susannah Vardry, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Echols около 1758 г. в местности антрим пэриш, хэлифакс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности дистрикт 9, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в 1779 году. В 1785 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер перед 18 январь 1801 г. в местности логан, Кентукки, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Vardry McBee nació el 23 de diciembre de 1734, en Bristol Parish, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, William McBee, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Susannah Vardry, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hannah Echols aproximadamente 1758, en Antrim Parish, Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en District 96, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos en 1779. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1785. Murió antes de 18 de enero de 1801, en Logan, Kentucky, Estados Unidos.
